name: Layered Noise Field
description: Multi-octave noise that drifts like pigment suspended in glass.
prompt: Embody the layered-noise-field specimen at the project root, then make it drift slower and tint it moss green.
evolve: Blend in a second octave and pulse the contrast every four beats.

name: Infinite Zoom Tunnel
description: A scale and rotate feedback loop that folds itself into a tunnel.
prompt: Embody the infinite-zoom-tunnel specimen, then slow the zoom until it feels like a camera drifting through fog.
evolve: Route layered-noise-field into the source and add a soft bloom grade.

name: Curl Noise Swarm
description: A particle field pushed by curl noise with soft additive trails.
prompt: Embody the curl-noise-swarm specimen and make the particles move like sparks inside a magnetic field.
evolve: Push the trails through infinite-zoom-tunnel for a recursive star field.

name: Spectrum Reactor
description: Audio bands drive mirrored bars, bloom, and reactive color pressure.
prompt: Embody spectrum-reactor and drive it from an audio oscillator if no microphone is present.
evolve: Wrap the bars into a radial ring and let the bass open the bloom.

name: Signed Distance Lantern
description: A compact SDF raymarch with glassy edges and a slow internal glow.
prompt: Embody signed-distance-lantern, then make the form feel heavier and the light warmer.
evolve: Use audio amplitude to breathe the SDF radius without changing the camera.

name: Bloom Grade Stack
description: A reusable post chain for glow, lift, contrast, and final output polish.
prompt: Embody bloom-grade-stack after my render and keep the blacks clean while the highlights breathe.
evolve: Add a subtle chromatic edge pass only on the brightest regions.
